news.title:
Coal India sets April 27, 2026, board meeting to declare Q4 results and final dividend for FY26.
Analysts predict weak Q4FY26 performance for Coal India due to competition, high inventories, and softer demand.
news.summary:
Coal India sets April 27, 2026, board meeting to declare Q4 results and final dividend for FY26.
Analysts predict weak Q4FY26 performance for Coal India due to competition, high inventories, and softer demand.

news.title: Coal India to review Q4 results on April 27, crucial for coal sector.

news.title:
Citi retains a neutral rating on Coal India, targeting Rs 430/share.
Coal India may absorb higher costs, reducing e-auction prices while boosting volumes.
news.summary:
Citi retains a neutral rating on Coal India, targeting Rs 430/share.
Coal India may absorb higher costs, reducing e-auction prices while boosting volumes.

news.title:
Coal India shares fell 6% to ₹427.5 on NSE after reducing coal reserve prices amid rising input costs.
CIL absorbs input cost hikes, including 44% rise in ammonium nitrate and 54% diesel surge, to shield consumers.
news.summary:
Coal India shares fell 6% to ₹427.5 on NSE after reducing coal reserve prices amid rising input costs.
CIL absorbs input cost hikes, including 44% rise in ammonium nitrate and 54% diesel surge, to shield consumers.

news.title:
Coal India shares fall 5% as it absorbs higher costs.
The company also reduces e-auction prices, impacting stock performance.
news.summary:
Coal India shares fall 5% as it absorbs higher costs.
The company also reduces e-auction prices, impacting stock performance.

news.title:
Coal India's subsidiaries reduced reserve prices for coal in single-window e-auctions.
The move aims to enhance participation and boost supply clearance in auctions.
news.summary:
Coal India's subsidiaries reduced reserve prices for coal in single-window e-auctions.
The move aims to enhance participation and boost supply clearance in auctions.

news.title:
Coal India's explosive costs surged 26% to ₹49,783/ton by March-end from ₹39,588 in Feb 2026.
This increase is expected to exert near-term production cost pressure for the company.
news.summary:
Coal India's explosive costs surged 26% to ₹49,783/ton by March-end from ₹39,588 in Feb 2026.
This increase is expected to exert near-term production cost pressure for the company.

news.title:
Coal India absorbs rising costs; explosives up 26%, ammonium nitrate 44%, diesel 54%.
Coal auction frequency and quantity increased, leading to moderated prices.
news.summary:
Coal India absorbs rising costs; explosives up 26%, ammonium nitrate 44%, diesel 54%.
Coal auction frequency and quantity increased, leading to moderated prices.

news.title:
Coal India's ammonium nitrate costs surged 44% to Rs 72,750/ton from Rs 50,500 pre-war.
The cost increase adds pressure to Coal India's input costs.
news.summary:
Coal India's ammonium nitrate costs surged 44% to Rs 72,750/ton from Rs 50,500 pre-war.
The cost increase adds pressure to Coal India's input costs.

news.title:
Macquarie revises target prices for steel majors like Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Hindalco, and Jindal Steel, highlighting strong Q4FY26 EBITDA due to robust domestic demand and rebounding prices.
JSW Steel is Macquarie's top pick with a Rs 1,353 target, while Hindalco, Jindal Steel, Coal India, and Tata Steel receive updated ratings reflecting mixed sectoral prospects and input cost challenges.
news.summary:
Macquarie revises target prices for steel majors like Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Hindalco, and Jindal Steel, highlighting strong Q4FY26 EBITDA due to robust domestic demand and rebounding prices.
JSW Steel is Macquarie's top pick with a Rs 1,353 target, while Hindalco, Jindal Steel, Coal India, and Tata Steel receive updated ratings reflecting mixed sectoral prospects and input cost challenges.

news.title:
Coal India absorbs input cost hikes, shielding Indian coal users.
CIL compensates contractors for higher industrial diesel prices in mines.
news.summary:
Coal India absorbs input cost hikes, shielding Indian coal users.

news.title: Motilal Oswal recommends Buy on Coal India; CMP: 449.2 as of Apr 8.

news.title:
Coal India's FY26 production fell 1.6% YoY to 768 MT; offtake dropped 2% YoY.
March saw a MoM pickup, but FY26 overall volumes remained subdued.
news.summary:
Coal India's FY26 production fell 1.6% YoY to 768 MT; offtake dropped 2% YoY.

news.title:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).
news.summary:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).

news.title:
Coal India (CIL) plans to auction 25.62 MT coal in April to address energy supply issues amid West Asia crisis.
CIL to expand SWMA auctions to Bangladesh, Bhutan, Nepal from Jan 2026, enhancing transparency and market integration.
news.summary:
Coal India (CIL) plans to auction 25.62 MT coal in April to address energy supply issues amid West Asia crisis.

news.title:
MCL and BCGCL sign land lease for a 2,000 TPD coal-to-ammonium nitrate project.
The project at Lakhanpur, Jharsuguda, marks progress in India's coal gasification efforts.
news.summary:

Details include quantities offered, allocated, percentage allocation, and price increase.

news.title:
Coal India reported a 1.5% decline in March coal production to 84.5 MT YoY.
Coal offtake rose 0.7% YoY in March, reaching 69.5 MT from 69 MT.
news.summary:
Coal India reported a 1.5% decline in March coal production to 84.5 MT YoY.
Coal offtake rose 0.7% YoY in March, reaching 69.5 MT from 69 MT.

news.title:
Coal India's March 2026 coal offtake rose 0.7% YoY to 69.5 MT.
This increase indicates mild demand growth during the month.
news.summary:
